paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58, which represents a decrease of 1.05% from the prior close and a decrease of 24.28% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 22, 2026.

Recent news headlines include announcements of Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, set for August 13, 2026, as well as discussions of the company's recent stock price decline and governance concerns. One headline mentions the resignation of director designee Miles Everson, who cited governance concerns, and the completion of a $375 million offering of 5.00% senior convertible notes.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A filing disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as filings related to the issuance of convertible senior notes due 2031. There is one Form 4 filing in the feed, with no Form 144 filings.
